name: MAGIC PAWS Maritime Gazetteer
description: Controlled maritime gazetteer for inferred geolocation. MAGIC PAWS / MARITIME PHASE ZERO. Expanded global v4: adds a larger Atlantic trade-port package for West Africa, Gulf of Guinea, Brazil, Colombia, Chile, Argentina, Guianas/Suriname and the Caribbean. Exact issue-body coordinates override inferred places. Port coordinates are practical gazetteer anchors, not official survey points.

en: Onne Oil and Gas Free Zone
Port of São Francisco do Sul
pt: Porto de São Francisco do Sul

matching_notes: Exact coordinates in issue bodies override gazetteer inference.
Area matches should be displayed as circles or soft markers, never as exact event locations.
Port coordinates are practical gazetteer anchors for OSINT routing, not official survey-grade positions.
Prefer explicit issue labels or coordinates for ambiguous names such as Cartagena, San Antonio, Georgetown, Greenville or Santos.
v4 adds Atlantic trade-port coverage for West Africa, Gulf of Guinea, Brazil, Colombia, Chile, Argentina, Guianas/Suriname and the Caribbean.

curation_notes.added_package: West Africa, South America Atlantic/Pacific trade ports, Guianas/Suriname and Caribbean
